## Checklist

### General
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines

### For Code Changes
- [ ] Tests have been added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Code has been linted (`npm run lint` / `ruff check`)
- [ ] Code has been formatted (`npm run format` / `ruff format`)

### For UI Changes
- [ ] Screenshots/videos of the change have been included
- [ ] Changes are responsive (mobile, tablet, desktop)

### Documentation
- [ ] README has been updated (if applicable)
- [ ] API documentation has been updated (if applicable)

### For Infrastructure Changes
- [ ] Terraform/Docker changes have been tested
- [ ] Environment variables have been documented
